purpose: Dynamic relationship memory for two characters. Stores both sides in one file.
load_rules: Load if both characters are active, nearby, speaking, observing each other, or one directly affects the other in the current scene.
Load if one character directly thinks or speaks about the other and the relationship is relevant to the current scene goal.
Load if current calendar day, current scene goal or open thread explicitly requires this pair.
Do not load only because Akira is POV.
Do not load all Akira relationship pairs by default.
Do not load future relationship dynamics before they become active in state.

protected_moments.why_it_matters: why this person would remember it
protected_moments.future_hook: how it can affect later reactions

compaction_notes: Do not flatten relationship into generic labels like friends/enemies/tense if specific hooks exist.
Compress repeated routine interactions, but keep emotional pivots, promises, refusals, accusations and protected moments.
Keep who knows what and who does not know what.
